hints.description: This company is a retailer of used vehicles, offering a wide selection of cars, trucks, and SUVs. They provide a no-haggle pricing model and also offer vehicle history reports and extended warranties. CEO Rick ****** has focused on expanding their online presence and digital retailing capabilities to enhance the customer experience.
hints.funFact1: The company was originally founded in 1993 as a division of Circuit City, but became an independent publicly traded company in 1997 after Circuit City spun it off.
hints.funFact2: They operate a network of stores across the United States and have consistently ranked highly in customer satisfaction surveys for the automotive retail industry.
